chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ الْمُرَاجَعَةَ لَا تَكُونُ إِلَّا بِالْمُوَاقَعَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 14 – The reversion does not happen except with the copulation

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/125)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/125)
text: الرَّجْعَةُ الْجِمَاعُ وَ إِلَّا فَإِنَّمَا هِيَ وَاحِدَةٌ .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Sama’at, from Safwan, from Ibn Muskan, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The reversion is the copulation with her, or else, rather it is one (divorce)’.
en.sarwar: 5. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from ibn Sama‘ah from Safwan from ibn Muskan from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Going back is going to bed with her, otherwise, it is only one divorce.’”
